sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105916" key="*tumwli/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τυμωλ-ίς</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τυμωλ-ῑτική</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τυμωλ-ιτίκιον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τύμωλ-ος</orth>, <sense id="n105916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τμῶλος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
